acceptance_targets: [chapter_04_F005] PASS if only one consecutive 'Not ...' construction remains in the chapter and the closing beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:275 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:277 are rendered as complete sentences with explicit subject-verb structure. FAIL if two or more negation-ladder sequences remain.

[chapter_04_F006] PASS if the revised section between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:163 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:195 contains at least three distinct interiority beats and no span exceeds nine consecutive paragraphs without interiority before snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:197. FAIL if the section remains externally procedural until the turn at line 197.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if only one consecutive 'Not ...' construction remains in the chapter and the closing beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:275 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:277 are rendered as complete sentences with explicit subject-verb structure. FAIL if two or more negation-ladder sequences remain.
findings.problem: A recurring negation-ladder pattern ('Not X ...') appears more than twice and becomes a prose tic; in the closing it also leans into clipped-fragment emphasis that flattens rather than sharpens impact.
findings.rewrite_direction: Keep one strongest negation-ladder instance (recommended: snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:53) and rewrite the others at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:197, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:275, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:277 into distinct, fully grammatical sentence shapes with concrete imagery.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised section between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:163 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:195 contains at least three distinct interiority beats and no span exceeds nine consecutive paragraphs without interiority before snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:197. FAIL if the section remains externally procedural until the turn at line 197.
findings.problem: The database run from roughly line 163 to line 195 goes 10+ consecutive paragraphs without explicit focalizer interiority (thought, sensation, memory, or self-assessment), so close-third texture thins into procedural transcript.
findings.rewrite_direction: Within the database segment between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:163 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:195, thread at least three brief interior beats from Marisol (for example a bodily stress cue, a judgment about risk, and a memory association) before snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_04.md:197.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When choosing between reputationally safe abstraction and specific discomfort, choose specificity. Render addiction, sexuality, deceit, class shame, and grief at lived scale. In edge cases, preserve character truth and causal accountability over reader comfort or institutional decorum.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene demands bodily, moral, or economic specificity, euphemistic phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with concrete stakes and observable consequence.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; full forms appear only for emphasis, ritual language, or character-specific formal posture

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate scene density and pressure modes: pair high-conflict chapters with quiet domestic or documentary chapters, vary dialogue-to-interiority ratios, and prevent identical chapter skeletons in consecutive sequence.
prose_style_profile.diction: contemporary literary diction with class-aware, borough-specific concreteness; avoid prestige-neutral workshop language
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third centered on Marisol, with rare brief distance expansions for institutional scenes
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: alternating tensile compression and reflective extension; line-level cadence should carry emotional pressure, not just information
